title: AI Sprouts
subtitle: Grow Your Understanding
description: Build on your foundations. Learn about different types of AI, understand data, and explore how AI makes decisions. Gentle introduction to the concepts behind the magic.
audience: Learners who completed AI Seeds or have basic AI awareness
outcomes: Distinguish supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning
Understand what training data is and why it matters
Think critically about AI bias and fairness
